synopsis: Learn through interesting questions and answers.

name: How to Weigh an Elephant collection
description: How to Weigh an Elephant collection
author: nagesh
categories: Animals and Nature|Bedtime Stories|Morals and Values|Science and Nature
title: How to Weigh an Elephant
synopsis: This book is a wonderful way to introduce kids to Lilavati, the great mathematician from a millennium ago.In this story, Lilavati does what no other brain in the kingdom could do – she succeeds in calculating the weight of the king’s favourite elephant.

name: The Farm Animals Collection
author: nayna
title: The Farm Animals
synopsis: The farm animal is a cute picture book for toddlers and preschoolers who are fond of animals. The book introduces them to the different animals on the farm along with the sounds for each animal. My two year old can't seem to get enough of it, I hope your little ones enjoy it too!

name: Vayu the Wind collection
author: nagesh
title: Vayu, the Wind
synopsis: Vayu, The Wind written by Madhuri Pai and published by Pratham Books is intended for kids from the ages of 3-6yrs. The book is a great way to teach the kids about wind and its effects. Even though we can see it, the wind plays an integral part in our lives and what better way to learn about it than this. So let’s learn about the wind from a kid's perspective. And play game when hover over the game image.

name: The Jungle School Collection
author: sandeep kumar
categories: Action and Adventure|Animals and Nature|Family and Friends|School Time
title: Vayu, the Wind
synopsis: The jungle school, written by Madhav Chavan & Meera Tendolkar, published by Pratham Books is a cute story  about how the jungle animals rush to the new school with great enthusiasm. A very nice read for young readers who are starting to read by themselves
